title: Scout Microtransit Program Records, RFP 604918-25/PCD, Contracts, Planning Materials, and Ridership Reports (County Manager)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to Chapter 119, Florida Statutes, and Article I, Section 24 of the Florida Constitution, I request the following public records related to Seminole County’s Scout microtransit program and RFP 604918-25/PCD:

1. All vendor proposals submitted in response to RFP 604918-25/PCD, including proposals from BeFree LLC, Circuit Transit Inc., and River North Transit LLC, d/b/a Via Transportation Inc.

2. Evaluation committee score sheets, scoring records, ranking documentation, evaluator comments, tabulations, and any other records reflecting the evaluation and ranking of proposals submitted in response to RFP 604918-25/PCD.

3. A native-digital copy of Exhibit A-1 (Best and Final) from the executed agreement with BeFree LLC.

4. Planning documents, feasibility studies, analyses, memoranda, presentations, briefing materials, and similar records prepared by county staff during Summer and Fall 2024 concerning evaluation of microtransit alternatives, including any materials relating to the study visit to Volusia County referenced in the November 12, 2024 Board of County Commissioners work session presentation.

5. The Title VI fare structure compliance analysis prepared by any outside consultant and referenced at the May 20, 2025 Board of County Commissioners meeting.

6. The official notification letter or notice sent to LYNX following the May 20, 2025 Board of County Commissioners vote awarding the Scout microtransit contract.

7. Performance data and monthly ridership reports for the Scout program from October 1, 2025 through the most recent available reporting period.

If any portion of the requested records exists in electronic form, I request production in electronic format. If any responsive records are already publicly available online, please identify them with sufficient specificity to permit direct access.

If any part of this request is denied, please state in writing the specific legal basis for each withholding, including the applicable statutory exemption.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Drake Thomsen

title: Scout Microtransit Program Emails, Vendor Communications, Procurement Records, LYNX Transition, and Intergovernmental Communications (County Manager)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to Chapter 119, Florida Statutes, and Article I, Section 24 of the Florida Constitution, I request public records consisting of emails and related electronic communications concerning Seminole County’s Scout microtransit program.

This request includes responsive emails, complete email threads, attachments, and calendar invitations within the scopes below. Please preserve standard metadata where available, including sender, recipient, date, time, subject line, and attachment names.

Search 1: BeFree / Freebee Vendor Communications
Date range: December 1, 2024 through present

Search terms:
- "BeFree" OR "Freebee" OR "Free Bee"
- "Jason Spiegel" OR "Spiegel"
- "Jason Mancini" OR "Mancini"
- "ridefreebee"

Named accounts to search:
- Kristian Swenson
- Timothy Jecks
- Ji Li
- Leticia Figueroa
- Stephen Koontz
- Robert Bradley
- Gladys Marrozos
- John Slot
- Darren Gray

Search 2: RFP Procurement
Date range: December 1, 2024 through June 30, 2025

Search terms:
- "RFP 604918" OR "604918-25" OR "604918-25/PCD"
- "Circuit Transit" OR "River North Transit" OR "Via Transportation"
- "best and final"

Named accounts to search:
- Leticia Figueroa
- Stephen Koontz
- Robert Bradley
- Gladys Marrozos
- Kristian Swenson
- Timothy Jecks
- Lorie Bailey-Brown
- Ji Li

Search 3: LYNX Transition
Date range: August 1, 2024 through present

Search terms:
- "LYNX" AND ("transition" OR "discontinue" OR "terminate" OR "exit cost" OR "route elimination" OR "service reduction")

Named accounts to search:
- Kristian Swenson
- Timothy Jecks
- Darren Gray
- John Slot
- Ji Li

Search 4: Intergovernmental Communications
Date range: August 1, 2024 through present

Search terms:
- ("Scout" OR "microtransit" OR "micro-transit") AND ("Altamonte Springs" OR "Casselberry" OR "Lake Mary" OR "Longwood" OR "Oviedo" OR "Sanford" OR "Winter Springs" OR "FDOT" OR "MetroPlan")

Named accounts to search:
- Darren Gray
- Kristian Swenson
- Commissioner Andria Herr
- Commissioner Jay Zembower
- Commissioner Bob Dallari
- Commissioner Amy Lockhart
- Commissioner Lee Constantine
- Ji Li

Please produce responsive records in electronic format. If native production is available, I request production in native format or another format that preserves metadata and attachments.

If any part of this request is denied, please state in writing the specific legal basis for each withholding, including the applicable statutory exemption.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Drake Thomsen
